title: Entry and publication of rules
doc_html:
§73.  Entry and publication of rules

The rules adopted by the supreme court shall be entered in its minutes, and shall be published in the manner which the court deems most effective and practicable.
doc_text:
§73.  Entry and publication of rules
The rules adopted by the supreme court shall be entered in its minutes, and shall be published in the manner which the court deems most effective and practicable.
